description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Golden coloured earringRound shaped base with garnet coloured stone in the centre, pearl like bead detail around the stone Half bell shaped dangler attached to the bottom of the base with embossed design, pearl detail at the periphery and a garnet coloured stone dangling from the centre Push back closure Material and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 57 mm
